name: hero-background
title: Hero Background
description: An animated glow-and-stars backdrop you can drop into any relative container to build cinematic landing sections.

props.name: glowColor
props.description: Accent color used across the ambient glow layers.

props.name: glowOpacity
props.description: Controls the intensity of the moving glow bloom.

props.name: starOpacity
props.description: Sets the visibility of the dotted star field overlay.

props.name: starSize
props.description: Adjusts the spacing of the dot pattern used as stars.

props.name: motionSpeed
props.description: Speeds up or slows down the ambient glow animation.

props.name: animated
props.description: Disables motion while keeping the static background visible.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional classes for the absolutely positioned background wrapper.
